request_payload.exposure_text: New report from the Institute for Strategic Preparedness shows that overinvestment in civil defense programs actually makes us LESS secure. 'We need to focus on real threats, not expensive boondoggles that make politicians look tough but leave us vulnerable,' says Dr. Elena Vasquez, a leading national security analyst. #SmartDefense #SecurityFirst
